case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. RETHA WELLONS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033 (B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 75213624) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLONS, RETHA AKA DR RETHA V WELLONS $5,000.46 PRINCIPAL, $297.61 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,298.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75213624)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73786171) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WELLONS, RETHA AKA DR RETHA V WELLONS DOES 1-10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-21-2025

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $297.61 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.30 (TRANSACTION ID # 75213624) AS TO DEFENDANT WELLONS, RETHA AKA DR RETHA V WELLONS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 75213624) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 73786171) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 73786171) TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
